name: ifl-ios-standards
description: Reusable iOS standards with 9 specialist agents, 21 skills including enterprise-ios, provider-native Brain Flow, ten enterprise chapters, and thin build-system-neutral source scaffolders.

interface.shortDescription: 9 agents, 21 iOS skills, standards, and source scaffolders
interface.longDescription: Brings reusable iOS engineering standards into Codex through provider-native Brain Flow. The plugin ships 9 specialist agents, 21 skills including enterprise-ios and Boardy/VIP task routing, ten focused enterprise chapters, and thin build-system-neutral module/board source scaffolders. Reference paths shown as ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/standards/… resolve relative to this plugin root under Codex.
defaultPrompt: Set up iOS project bindings with the reusable standards
Review this Swift code against the iOS standards
Scaffold a Boardy/VIP module in module X
